goal_scope: Add a higher-functionality browser-local Experiments observation workflow to the public-safe LifeMax app and deploy it to Vercel.
truth_boundary: This proof covers browser-local demo behavior only.
WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, backend writes, and shared-context daily usability are still not connected or claimed.

Production deployment was approved earlier in this goal with PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote; no credential, auth setting, DNS/custom-domain, backend, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, or WHOOP mutation was performed.
defects_found: Experiments could start, stop, and mark inconclusive, but had no user-facing observation log, so the surface still felt shallow.
First Playwright rerun after the feature found duplicated ended-experiment result copy in the builder and result panel.
Second Playwright rerun found that Profile status tile text fused label/value content, making the observation count harder to verify and less accessible.

repairs_made.summary: Added ExperimentObservationSignal, ExperimentObservation, LocalExperiment.observations normalization, export summary experiment_observations count, day-review evidence count contribution, and active/ended experiment summary observation counts.

Added active experiment observation form, signal segmented control, local save status, recent observation list, memory candidate write, refresh-persistent observation state, Profile observation count, Privacy observation-log copy, and non-duplicative ended-experiment builder copy.
Added accessible aria labels to status tiles so label/value pairs like Experiment observations: 1 are inspectable.
Added restrained styling for experiment observation form, observation list, and signal pills while preserving the existing app-shell design.
Added unit and Playwright assertions for observation derivation, export summary, observation save, refresh persistence, Profile count, export preview, and mobile screenshot capture.

local_checks.summary: tsc --noEmit passed after observation model/UI updates.
eslint passed after observation model/UI updates.
First rerun found duplicate ended-experiment copy; second rerun found weak Profile status semantics; after repairs, Next build plus Playwright visual smoke passed: 2 tests.
No whitespace errors in the final diff.
No secret-shaped values found; matches were only public truth-boundary words like WHOOP/disabled services.

browser_flows_proven: Today local check-in still works and unlocks local planning context.
Capture saves a browser-local event that unlocks pattern/experiment readiness.
Experiments starts a local experiment from local evidence.
Experiments logs an observation with signal, note, timestamp, local status message, and visible recent-observation list.
Profile shows Experiment observations: 1 and export preview includes experiment_observations plus the observation note.
Privacy is reachable and states the observation-log boundary.
Mobile viewport 390px had no horizontal overflow in local and production smoke.

production_smoke.script_summary: Playwright shell smoke drove Today, Capture, Experiments observation save, refresh persistence, Profile export preview, and Privacy on both production aliases; no console/page/HTTP 500 errors were captured.

independent_verification.note: quality_verifier verified the observation model/UI/tests, reran read-only Vercel inspect for lifemax-web and life-max-omega, ran fresh headless production smoke on both aliases, and found no blocker for this checkpoint. It explicitly rejected broader COMPLETE_OK because backend/shared-context/WHOOP/Telegram/n8n/public MCP/Grok/Postgres remain unproved or red.
defects_found_by_verifier: Worktree was still dirty and not yet durably checkpointed in git.
This proof packet was untracked before this patch.
The independent_verification field was still pending before this patch.

stop_continue_decision: checkpoint, not complete: this continuation raises public browser-local Experiments functionality and deploys it, but full LifeMax shared-context/backend/daily-use readiness remains red and unproved.
next_action: Commit and push this observation workflow plus proof; if continuing the broader goal, either clean up Vercel project split/preview protection or begin a separate backend/shared-context Wave 1 repair after local MCP/shared-context reads are green.
